text: Am a newbie to linux. I cant get sound on my machine and it gives me an error message on start up (Sound related).i've tried eveything i think i know but to no luck. I think its sound drivers but i dont know where to start looking for them. i went to my motherboards site but htey wont give me any support for linux. Please help. I deeply appreciate your help in advance.
